site.title: OneStar | Turn Reviews Into Local Customers
site.description: OneStar helps local businesses win more customers through review and reputation management, Google Business Profile optimization, and fast, simple websites.

hero.title: Turn Your Reviews Into Walk-In Customers
hero.subtitle: OneStar manages your reviews and Google Business Profile so local customers find you, trust you, and walk in.

freeTip.title: Your One-Star Reviews Are Your Best Salespeople
freeTip.content1: Customers scroll straight to the one-star reviews and trust them more than any wall of praise. That is where they decide whether to believe you.
freeTip.highlight2: Here is the part most owners miss:
freeTip.content2: A calm, professional, public response to a real negative review convinces skeptics better than 200 five-star reviews ever could. OneStar monitors every review you receive and crafts responses that show future customers how you treat people when something goes wrong.
freeTip.content3: Our QR review system also makes it easy for happy customers to leave authentic positive reviews, so your profile grows on real experiences, not tricks.

services.title: What We Do for Local Businesses

websiteOptimization.title: Website Optimization
websiteOptimization.description: We tune and speed up your existing site so it ranks higher in local searches and turns visitors into calls and walk-ins.

websiteCreation.title: Website Creation
websiteCreation.description: We build fast, simple websites that make it easy for nearby customers to find you, call you, and show up.

googleBusinessManagement.title: Google Business Profile Management
googleBusinessManagement.description: We keep your profile complete, accurate, and active so you appear when locals search for what you sell.

aiReviewSystem.title: AI-Powered QR Review System
aiReviewSystem.description: A QR code at your counter invites happy customers to leave a review, and AI helps you respond to every one quickly.

about.title: About OneStar
about.content1: OneStar works with gyms, restaurants, salons, and local shops that live by their reputation. We manage your reviews, your Google Business Profile, and your website so people nearby choose you over the place down the street.
about.content2: The first consultation is free. We look at your reviews and your online presence, tell you plainly what is hurting you, and explain what we would fix first. If we are not a fit, you still walk away knowing where you stand.

cta.title: Ready for More Local Customers?
cta.content: Tell us about your business and get a free, no-pressure review of your online presence.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Tell us about your business. The first consultation is free.
contact.formInfo: Fill out the form below and we will get back to you as soon as we can.

form.name: Your name
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your business and what you need help with.
form.success: Thanks! Your message is on its way. We'll get back to you soon.
form.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

affiliate.title: Become an Affiliate
affiliate.description: Earn a perpetual 10% commission on every sale.
affiliate.subheading: Refer a client to OneStar and earn 10% of every sale they generate, with no time limit.
